MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ERROL GILLIS' Notice of Hearing for Petition of Mandate - Duplicate entry. (302/CWW)

Ntc Of Motion And Objection Of Petitione To Strike Respondent'S Opposition To Petitoners Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner Errol Gillis Motion and Objection of Petitioner to Strike Respondent's Opposition to Petitioner's Writ of Mandate. Appearances: William E. Manning, Esq. of Sellar Hazard (925) 938-1430 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party; Kim M. Settles, Deputy Attorney General, (510) 622-2138 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. (This tentative ruling is not being contested.) The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is Denied as moot. Court granted respondent permission to late-file the opposition by ex parte order on May 18, 2010. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ERROL GILLIS' Motion for Peremptory Writ of Administrative Mandamus. Appearances: William E. Manning, Esq. of Sellar Hazard (925) 938-1430 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party; Kim M. Settles, Deputy Attorney General, (510) 622-2138 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Granted and remanded for reconsideration of the penalty.
